---
name: Source suggestion
about: Add, fix, or disable a news feed (sources are data, curated in SQL)
title: "[source] "
labels: source
---

<!-- Sources live in the `sources` table; the live roster + health is on /about.
     Provide enough that a maintainer can add the row directly. -->

**Action**
- [ ] Add a new source
- [ ] Fix an existing source (wrong URL / region / language)
- [ ] Disable a source (consistently broken or off-topic)

**Outlet name**

**Feed URL** (RSS/Atom)

**Region**
<!-- One of the project's regions, e.g. US/Western, European, Russian, Iranian,
     Arab/Gulf, Israeli, East Asian, South Asian, African, Latin American. -->

**Primary language** (ISO code, e.g. en, fa, ar, he, ru, zh)

**Affiliation** (if notable)
- [ ] State-controlled / state-owned
- [ ] Public broadcaster
- [ ] Exile / diaspora
- [ ] Independent / other

**Why this source** (relevance to global conflict coverage, and anything about its
reliability or bias worth flagging)
